title: Cobblemon Industrialization

body:
Cobblemon Integration: Dive into the Cobblemon universe, capturing and training your favorite creatures. Explore diverse biomes, discover new species, and build your ultimate Cobblemon team.
Advanced Technology: Harness the power of popular tech mods such as IndustrialCraft, Applied Energistics, Create and Thermal Expansion. Automate your base, manage resources efficiently, and create complex machinery to aid in your Cobblemon adventures.
Unique Synergies: Utilize technology to enhance your Cobblemon experience. Set up automated farms to produce essential resources for your Cobblemon, build advanced healing machines, and design intricate systems to manage your Cobblemon inventory.
Exploration and Adventure: Venture into a world filled with new challenges, dungeons, and hidden treasures. Use advanced tools and gadgets to navigate and conquer these adventures with ease.
Customization and Creativity: Express your creativity with many different building mods, allowing you to design and customize your base to reflect your unique style. Combine aesthetics with functionality for the ultimate Cobblemon tech haven.
Community and Multiplayer: Join forces with friends, Trade Cobblemon, collaborate on massive tech projects, and compete in exciting Cobblemon battles.
Get Ready to Explore, Capture, and Innovate!

Cobblemon Industrialization offers a seamless blend of creature collection and technological innovation, providing a unique and engaging Minecraft experience. Whether you're a Cobblemon enthusiast, a tech mod aficionado, or both, this modpack has something for everyone. Gather your gear, power up your machines, and set off on an unforgettable journey in TechnoCobble Adventures!

Additional credit to mod authors:

Cosmetic Armor Reworked by LainMi on [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cosmetic-armor-reworked](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cosmetic-armor-reworked)

Corpse by henkelmax on [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/corpse](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/corpse)
